# Docs Index

<!--
This file should be a curated entry point, not an exhaustive dump.
Order sections by importance and reading flow, not alphabetically.
-->

## Start Here

<!--
Link the first docs someone should read to understand the project.
Usually: project README, glossary, docs conventions.
-->

## Canonical Specs

<!--
Link the authoritative behavior and system-description docs.
Keep these at the top if they are the main source of truth.
-->

## ADRs

<!--
Link design decisions that explain why the system is built the way it is.
Group by domain if there are many ADRs.
-->

## Notes

<!--
Link working notes, design sessions, or exploratory documents that are useful
but not canonical.
-->

## Templates

<!--
Link the reusable templates themselves so future docs are easy to create.
-->
